name: ai-sdlc
description: AI-driven software delivery lifecycle for Claude Code — a clean, dependency-aware pipeline: discuss → req2prd → prd2plan → (plan2jira | plan2linear) → execute-plan, backed by 23 expert builder agents, 19 critic agents with a domain-matched affinity matrix, a mandatory Devil's Advocate adversarial gate, and shell-orchestrated plan execution with ralph-loop quality gates.
